description:
Browser where your favorite apps won't get buried in tabs.


🍪 Biscuit Release Note

⚡️New features
- Added configurable chrome themes for a more personalized browsing experience.
- Added a shortcut help dialog so available keyboard shortcuts are easier to discover.
- Expanded the app directory with 17 new services, including ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Google Chat, Google Meet, Linear, Canva, Vercel, Cloudflare, Supabase, Zoom, Bluesky, and Threads.

💪🏻Improvements
- Updated the default user agent to Chrome 146.
- Refined the dialog and settings UI for a cleaner, more consistent setup experience.
- Refreshed app directory metadata and updated X and X Pro branding, icons, and URL support to match the latest services.

🐞Bug
- Improved the add-tab drawer behavior for a smoother tab creation flow.
